items.name: MLB_prediction_model
items.description: MLB game score prediction model built in Python. Uses a multi-stage pipeline: Sagarin-style power ratings, team batting/pitching aggregation, and starting pitcher matchups. Trains a tuned Random Forest on 663 games × 104 features achieving ~2.6 Average run MAE. Predict any matchup by calling two teams and their starters.
